title: PM Lane 187 - PM Intake Field Launch Mobile Use Path
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Prove the phone-first field-launch review path Jason would use from the PM intake workbench before Temp Power mobilization, while keeping the route read-only and preserving every future write boundary.
scope: Added `expectMobileFieldLaunchUsePath` to the existing read-only PM import-intake Playwright smoke.
Set a `390x844` mobile viewport for the proof.

Proved Quick Jump Rail to Daily Script, Daily Script Minute 3 to Field Prep, Local Field Prep Queue, Local Field Questions Draft, Local Field Observation Scratchpad, and Current PM Next Actions and Guardrails.
Asserted populated field question and field observation values survive mobile hash navigation.
Asserted field-prep export artifacts are enabled without clicking or creating downloads inside the mobile path proof.
Asserted the path creates no unintended field-launch storage key and `mutationRequests` remains zero.
Used a read-only sidecar to define the mobile path, insertion point, pass/fail criteria, and no-write guardrails while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares product action.
No browser approval button, approval POST wiring, approval submission, or approval-row creation.

No field authorization, lead or crew assignment, schedule/status write, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
No new UI control, route, handler, filename, payload version, localStorage schema, backend route, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
validation: rg -n "PM Lane 187|expectMobileFieldLaunchUsePath|390x844|Minute 3: Check field-prep questions|Export Field Start Preflight|field-launch use path|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS - operations-web typecheck passed; operations-web build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the production route output; focused Playwright pm import-intake smoke passed cleanly after adding the 390x844 mobile field-launch use-path proof; packet JSON parsed; PM Lane 187 guardrail rg passed; git diff --check passed with only expected LF-to-CRLF warnings on touched and unrelated files.
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar Carver recommended the exact mobile path: Quick Jump Rail to Daily Script, Daily Script Minute 3 to Field Prep, Local Field Prep Queue, Field Questions Draft, Field Observation Scratchpad, and Guardrails at 390x844. The sidecar recommended inserting the proof after field questions and observations are populated and before localStorage/export assertions, while preserving zero mutations and no new storage keys.
